title: Group
description: A group record returned by the Cambridge Lookup/Ibis web service API.

cancelled.description: Flag indicating if the group is cancelled.

groupid.description: The group's numeric ID (a string, e.g., "100656").

description.description: The more detailed description of the group.

members.description: A list of the group's members, including recursively included groups (only populated when fetch includes all_members).
